child-plan.critical-rules: - CLAUDE.md Rule #22: ALL config values in .env.example FIRST. BANNED: ENV VAR=value in Dockerfiles for anything other than structural Python paths (PATH, PYTHONPATH, PYTHONUNBUFFERED, DOCKER_CONTAINER=1). Service URLs, ports, artifact paths go to .env.example + compose. - CLAUDE.md Rule #17: NO standalone scripts as run path. All flows go through Prefect in Docker. - CLAUDE.md Rule #18: /tmp FORBIDDEN for artifacts. Use pytest.tmp_path for test bind-mounts. - CLAUDE.md Rule #16: NO regex for structured data. JSON → json.loads(). YAML → yaml.safe_load(). - CLAUDE.md Rule #21: GitHub Actions EXPLICITLY DISABLED. Never add on: push or on: pull_request. - TDD MANDATORY: failing test first, then minimum implementation. Use self-learning-iterative-coder skill. - NEVER suggest python scripts/*.py as a run path while Prefect flows exist.

phase.name: Commit Dockerfile.base + Rule #22 .env.example audit
phase.description: Commit the already-correct uncommitted Dockerfile.base changes as an atomic first commit. Then audit and extend .env.example with all missing container-path and HPO variables.

task.name: Commit Dockerfile.base
task.description: The diff is already correct (UID/GID args, fail-fast uv sync, venv perms, umask, PATH). Commit it atomically — no other files.
task.changes: git add deployment/docker/Dockerfile.base git commit -m "fix(docker): Dockerfile.base — UID/GID args, fail-fast uv sync, venv perms"
task.acceptance: git show HEAD shows only Dockerfile.base; pre-commit passes.

task.name: RED — test_env_single_source.py Rule #22 checks
task.description: Add failing tests to tests/unit/deployment/test_env_single_source.py (or create if absent) that assert: DATA_DIR, CHECKPOINT_DIR, LOGS_DIR, SPLITS_DIR, POSTGRES_DB_OPTUNA, REPLICA_INDEX, OPTUNA_STORAGE_URL, PREFECT_LOGGING_EXTRA_LOGGERS are all in .env.example. Tests must parse .env.example with str.split() (no regex). They must FAIL before adding vars.
task.test-first: - test_data_dir_in_env_example - test_checkpoint_dir_in_env_example - test_logs_dir_in_env_example - test_splits_dir_in_env_example - test_postgres_db_optuna_in_env_example - test_replica_index_in_env_example - test_optuna_storage_url_in_env_example - test_prefect_logging_extra_loggers_in_env_example

task.name: GREEN — add missing vars to .env.example
task.description: Add the 8 missing variables to .env.example with correct defaults and comments. After adding, all T-PD.1.2 tests must pass. Then remove the corresponding ENV declarations from Dockerfile.train (DATA_DIR, CHECKPOINT_DIR, LOGS_DIR, SPLITS_DIR) — these should come only from compose injection. Update docker-compose.flows.yml x-common-env to reference ${VAR:-default} for each.

task.name: Checkpoint phase 1
task.test-command: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/unit/deployment/ -x -q && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports
task.acceptance: All pass. Commit: "fix(env): add missing container path vars to .env.example (Rule #22)"
task.on-failure: Fix the failing test or type error before proceeding.

phase.name: Issue #503 — Double-logging
phase.description: Make training logs visible in both terminal (already works via PYTHONUNBUFFERED) AND Prefect UI (via PREFECT_LOGGING_EXTRA_LOGGERS) AND durable JSONL files on the volume.

task.name: RED — test_flow_logging.py
task.test-first: - test_configure_flow_logging_adds_jsonl_handler: call configure_flow_logging(tmp_path), assert logging.getLogger("minivess") has a FileHandler writing to tmp_path/train.jsonl - test_jsonl_output_is_parseable: write a test log line, read the file, assert json.loads(line) succeeds (no regex — CLAUDE.md Rule #16) - test_flow_logging_does_not_add_duplicate_handlers: call configure_flow_logging twice, assert only ONE FileHandler added (idempotent) - test_configure_flow_logging_requires_path_not_string: assert TypeError if passed str

task.name: GREEN — src/minivess/observability/flow_logging.py
task.description: Implement configure_flow_logging(). JSONL format uses json.dumps() on the log record dict — no regex. Must be idempotent (check existing handlers before adding). Call once at the top of train_flow() and hpo_flow() entrypoints (NOT inside tasks).
task.content-guidance:
from __future__ import annotations import json import logging import os from pathlib import Path
def configure_flow_logging(logs_dir: Path, logger_name: str = "minivess") -> None: """Add JSONL FileHandler to the named logger. Idempotent.""" logs_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) log_path = logs_dir / "train.jsonl" logger = logging.getLogger(logger_name) # Idempotency check — avoid duplicate handlers if any(isinstance(h, logging.FileHandler) and getattr(h, "baseFilename", "") == str(log_path) for h in logger.handlers): return handler = logging.FileHandler(log_path, encoding="utf-8") handler.setFormatter(_JsonlFormatter()) logger.addHandler(handler)
class _JsonlFormatter(logging.Formatter): def format(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> str: payload = { "ts": record.created, "level": record.levelname, "logger": record.name, "msg": record.getMessage(), } return json.dumps(payload)
In train_flow.py, at top of training_flow(): from minivess.observability.flow_logging import configure_flow_logging configure_flow_logging(logs_dir=Path(os.environ.get("LOGS_DIR", "/app/logs")))

task.name: Checkpoint phase 2
task.test-command: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/unit/orchestration/test_flow_logging.py tests/unit/deployment/ -x -q && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports
task.acceptance: All pass. Commit: "feat(#503): flow_logging.py — JSONL handler + Prefect log wiring"

phase.name: Issue #434 — Docker smoke test
phase.description: Extend the existing integration smoke test to verify: checkpoint artifact exists on volume after container exit, MLflow run is FINISHED, Prefect was active.

task.name: RED — extend test_docker_training_smoke.py
task.test-first: - test_train_debug_run_produces_checkpoint: markers @pytest.mark.requires_docker, @pytest.mark.requires_train_image, @pytest.mark.slow. Bind-mount tmp_path/"checkpoints" to /app/checkpoints. Run: docker compose -f deployment/docker-compose.flows.yml run --rm -v {checkpoint_path}:/app/checkpoints -e MINIVESS_DEBUG=1 -e MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI=mlruns train --debug --max-epochs 1 --num-folds 1 Assert: any(checkpoint_path.rglob("*.pt")) is True. NOTE: use tmp_path (pytest fixture), NOT /tmp directly (CLAUDE.md Rule #18). - test_train_debug_run_mlflow_finished: same run, then use mlflow Python API to load the most recent run from mlruns/ and assert run.info.status == "FINISHED". - test_train_debug_run_prefect_active: assert the container logs contain "Prefect" and do NOT contain "PREFECT_DISABLED" active message.

task.name: GREEN — register pytest markers + implement smoke runner
task.description: Register requires_docker, requires_train_image, slow, gpu_required markers in pyproject.toml [tool.pytest.ini_options] markers section. Implement the smoke runner using subprocess.run() with the docker compose command. The test should skip (not fail) if Docker daemon not running or image not built. Use pytest.importorskip or a conftest fixture that checks docker info.
task.acceptance: Tests run (skip gracefully if Docker not available) or pass if Docker is running. MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/integration/orchestration/test_docker_training_smoke.py -x -q -m "not requires_docker" must pass (skips properly).

task.name: Checkpoint phase 3
task.test-command: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/integration/orchestration/ -x -q -m "not requires_docker" && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports
task.acceptance: All pass. Commit: "test(#434): Docker training smoke test — checkpoint + MLflow + Prefect assertions"

phase.name: Issue #504 — Flexible HPO allocation
phase.description: Add config-driven HPO allocation strategies: sequential (default), parallel (Postgres), hybrid (multi-GPU via CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES). No code changes to switch strategy.

task.name: RED — test_hpo_allocation.py
task.test-first: - test_allocation_strategy_sequential_parsed_from_yaml: load dynunet_example.yaml with allocation.strategy=sequential, assert AllocationStrategy.SEQUENTIAL - test_allocation_strategy_parallel_requires_postgres: AllocationStrategy.PARALLEL with optuna_storage=None raises ValueError("parallel strategy requires postgresql storage") - test_allocation_strategy_parallel_with_postgres_accepted: with optuna_storage="postgresql://user:pass@host/optuna" → no error - test_allocation_strategy_hybrid_sets_gpu_fields: strategy=hybrid, n_containers=4, trials_per_container=3 → AllocationConfig.n_containers==4 - test_hpo_engine_from_config_roundtrip: build HPOEngine via from_config(yaml_dict), assert sampler and pruner set correctly

task.name: GREEN — AllocationStrategy enum in hpo_engine.py
task.description: Add AllocationStrategy enum (SEQUENTIAL, PARALLEL, HYBRID) and AllocationConfig dataclass to hpo_engine.py. Add from_config(yaml_dict) classmethod to HPOEngine. Enforce: if strategy==PARALLEL and optuna_storage is None or not postgresql://, raise ValueError with clear message.

task.name: GREEN — YAML config update + compose hpo-worker service
task.description: Add allocation block to configs/hpo/dynunet_example.yaml (see planning doc §4.5). Add hpo-worker service to deployment/docker-compose.flows.yml for parallel strategy. Create scripts/hpo_worker_entrypoint.sh for hybrid GPU assignment.
task.content-guidance: hpo_worker_entrypoint.sh: #!/usr/bin/env bash set -euo pipefail # Assign GPU based on REPLICA_INDEX (set by docker compose or orchestrator) export CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES="${REPLICA_INDEX:-0}" exec uv run prefect flow run ...

task.name: GREEN — hpo_flow.py dispatch to strategy runner
task.description: Update hpo_flow() to read allocation config and dispatch: - SEQUENTIAL: optimize in-process (no subprocess) - PARALLEL: raise NotImplementedError with instructions (requires postgres + scale) - HYBRID: set CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES before calling optimize Add smoke integration test.

task.name: Checkpoint phase 4
task.test-command: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/unit/orchestration/test_hpo_allocation.py tests/integration/orchestration/test_hpo_smoke.py -x -q -m "not requires_docker" && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports
task.acceptance: All pass. Commit: "feat(#504): flexible HPO allocation — sequential/parallel/hybrid strategies"

task.name: Full test suite + PR creation
task.test-command: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/ -x -q -m "not requires_docker and not slow" && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports
task.on-failure: Fix any failures. Do NOT dismiss as pre-existing.

task.name: Create PR
task.description: Push branch and create PR closing #434, #503, #504. PR title: "fix: Docker/Prefect optimization — smoke test, log streaming, HPO allocation" PR body must include: summary, test plan, closes #434 #503 #504.
task.changes: git push -u origin fix/prefect-docker-monai-optimization gh pr create --title "fix: Docker/Prefect optimization — smoke test, log streaming, HPO allocation (#434 #503 #504)" --body "..."

child-plan.completion-signal: When this plan is complete, the next plan is: docs/planning/overnight-child-monai-eval.xml (MONAI multi-strategy evaluation — #505)
